posts.author: dwadsworth (Dustin Wadsworth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Touchscreen users cannot easily open an item. When they try to click the item name to open the item, it will instead open the item name editor function. The right side of the item’s title should display the OPEN item link/function all the time.
